name: Ender Dragón
description:
🖤🐉🖤

He's fallen before you, and now... he must accept his fate by your side.

🖤🐉🖤

In the depths of the End, amidst the infinite darkness, the battle came to an end. With the beast's last breath, the legendary Ender Dragon was defeated. Among the wreckage of the fight, only one object remained, shining and enigmatic: an egg, pulsating with strange energy. Without thinking much, you took it as a trophy, unaware that this simple act would change your fate forever.

🖤🐉🖤

Artist

@voviat

🖤🐉🖤
creator: OrangeLight
